message:
bd-ml2r.9.2: populate centrality tiers in Sugiyama layout

- Add compute_layout_centrality_tiers helper (FNX-enabled builds only)
- Call helper in layout_diagram_sugiyama_traced_with_config
- Populate node_centrality in layout extensions for render access

The centrality data is now available in DiagramLayout.extensions.node_centrality
for renderers to use when applying semantic styling classes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
